display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The team discovers a murdered lawyer had ties to a mob boss, and Red John targets an FBI agent re-examining the case of serial killer Panzer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a severed hand is found in a box of frozen cod, the team must uncover the identity of both the victim and the killer behind this grisly crime.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Lady Felicia's lavish New Year ball is ruined when a VIP guest is murdered.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When a city official is murdered, Carrie recognises the victim as someone she played poker with at an illegal casino and goes back to the tables undercover to solve the killing.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: A quiet afternoon game of lawn bowls turns to chaos when a man is killed on the green in broad daylight by an antique ornamental bushranger's gun.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. DI Goodman is embroiled in the cut-throat world of corporate team building.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a severed hand is found in a box of frozen cod, the team must uncover the identity of both the victim and the killer behind this grisly crime.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult crime drama set in 19th century Toronto. When bodies are discovered in a swamp it means a cold case for Murdoch.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret represents Susan's friend in a hostile work environment lawsuit after she quits her job at a fancy restaurant. When Todd gets sick, Margaret goes undercover as a dishwasher.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the quirky Victorian mystery series. Dr Ogden is attacked by a man who returns to life after being sent to the gallows.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Victorian mystery series set in Toronto, Canada. Murdoch is drawn into the world of Victorian erotica when he investigates the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. Father Brown is embroiled with MI5, putting Lady Felicia in a tricky position.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Van Pelt tries to put her personal problems aside while investigating the murder of a mob boss's son, and is forced into a game of cat-and-mouse against an assassin.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Rex is accused of attacking a decorated former police officer, Charlie enlists the help of an unorthodox ally to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al race against time as they investigate the link between the death of a coastguard officer and the disappearance of dangerous explosives.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New Year's Eve celebrations are cut short when a masked man stabs a woman in her own home. Jack and the team must uncover his identity before he strikes again.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the quirky Victorian mystery series. Dr Ogden is attacked by a man who returns to life after being sent to the gallows.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Victorian mystery series set in Toronto, Canada. Murdoch is drawn into the world of Victorian erotica when he investigates the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Van Pelt tries to put her personal problems aside while investigating the murder of a mob boss's son, and is forced into a game of cat-and-mouse against an assassin.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Rex is accused of attacking a decorated former police officer, Charlie enlists the help of an unorthodox ally to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. Father Brown is embroiled with MI5, putting Lady Felicia in a tricky position.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al race against time as they investigate the link between the death of a coastguard officer and the disappearance of dangerous explosives.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: A quiet afternoon game of lawn bowls turns to chaos when a man is killed on the green in broad daylight by an antique ornamental bushranger's gun.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a groom is stabbed at a lavish Indian wedding, the attempted murder uncovers multiple motives including fraud, organised crime and shady international schools.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: When Bex and the team race to stop Roy Barber, known as the Couple Killer, before he strikes again, they uncover a chilling scheme that puts Roy's crimes in a new light.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Where are the missing billions? Exploring the tunnels, lakes, and secret caches used by the Nazis to hide spoils of war.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces more items from the show's visits to Hutton-in-the-Forest, Chatsworth and the British Museum.

programme.title: Dom Chinea's Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Cornish newcomer Dom Chinea tries to fix a leaky sea pool near Mousehole. He buys a battered old Land Rover and starts a new project crushing waste concrete to fill potholes on his lane.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie mends a leaky pump on the Naughty Lass on the Grand Union Canal. In Watford, he visits a TV legend's home and buys gas from a friendly fuel boat.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune?
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould investigate when art dealer David Taylor believes he's found a work by Helen McNicoll, one of Canada's most celebrated impressionists.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Thunderbird / Citroen SM / Punto / BMW: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave admires a two-decade-old Punto with just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Waterloo Classics Takeover and Patina Event: A classic car club descend on the garage as they prepare to attend a new event that celebrates original and unrestored vehicles.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Wirral, Simon O'Brien has a crazy plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp, while Henry Cole restores a 1963 Ford Anglia.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A father and son team battle to get their vintage buses ready for the Brooklands bus show. Plus, a man tries to bring his great grandfather's motorcycle dreams back from the dead.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Skid Pan in a Vintage Bus: Bus obsessed radio DJ Ed Adoo gets the ultimate driving lesson in a double decker. Plus, a rare cutting edge bike from the past is saved by modern engineering.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Mini makeover reduces its owners to tears. A replica, 1925 cycle car, that's taken six years to build, comes a cropper at Brooklands.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave and Jack head to East Yorkshire to pick up an Alfa Romeo and a 1930s Jowett. But Dave's more taken with a Carry On-style, bum-wobbling exercise machine.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a lovingly restored 1925 Calthorpe motorbike that he thinks is more of a work of art than anything ever produced by Picasso.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Hear how the Netherlands lived under Nazi rule for four years and how its people decided where their loyalties lay. Narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Manchester Town Hall, where items awaiting valuation include a chair that Arthur Negus examined on the show 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Charlecote Park, near Stratford-upon-Avon, to value items including a collection of gold boxes.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rare Bond Bugs.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Derek is in Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack deals with a Mini Mayfair in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctioned.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Hear how the Netherlands lived under Nazi rule for four years and how its people decided where their loyalties lay. Narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Manchester Town Hall, where items awaiting valuation include a chair that Arthur Negus examined on the show 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Dom Chinea's Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Dom tries out water dowsing so he can fill his new pond. He and engineer friend Sam Lovegrove fix some church bells and then put a surf lifesaving club's quad bike back on the beach.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie pick up a JZR three wheeler speed demon while Dave gets nostalgic over a brace of Raleigh Choppers, a few Honda C90s and a rare Mark 1 Ford Granada.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek journeys to Essex to collect Pete Wood's Austin Allegro, which has been sitting in an aircraft hangar at Audley End for 20 years.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rare Bond Bugs.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Derek is in Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack deals with a Mini Mayfair in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctioned.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Two stolen utes, fleeing youths and two Delta units in hot pursuit. Biosecurity Estelle and Pippa have a disgusting mystery on their hands. DOC’s Scott and Milly head to an island paradise. S15 E3

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: There’s cannabis hidden in underpants. A flat tyre blocks a one-lane bridge. A big brunch leads to a food-coma behind the wheel. S10 E3

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The stakes are high when Matty represents one of Jacobson Moore's own on trial amidst her and Edwin's 50th wedding anniversary; Olympia and Julian track down a scientist from the Wellbrexa lab. S2 E12

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Wedding-mania descends on the Brown household as the family prepare for Rory and Dino's big day.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Esther has a plan.

programme.title: Down For Love
programme.desc: Alex looks for someone who shares the same passions as he does. Charlize battles her parents' reservations about her search for love and Ray and Hayley get cozy. S2 E3

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Husband and wife architects Gaurav and Vish design a multigenerational home for their ageing parents and young children, entirely clad in over 9000 terracotta tiles.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway discover the hidden world of the Waterloo and City, the only line entirely underground.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When Shirley's dad loses his job, Wolfie is determined to win it back - along with the old man's favour. However, nothing ever goes to plan in a Wolfie Smith campaign.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and the Tooting Popular Front find themselves terrified by local criminal Fenning over an issue of stolen stereos.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is shell-shocked to be given a job despite his best efforts otherwise, but Dad is delighted that Yeti is joining the honest working classes.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When an old school friend - now a successful American record producer - drops back into town, Wolfie begins to see himself as a rockstar in the making.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front gathers international support when a foreign revolutionary arrives at the house asking after Wolfie and talking about financial support.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When Shirley's dad loses his job, Wolfie is determined to win it back - along with the old man's favour. However, nothing ever goes to plan in a Wolfie Smith campaign.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and the Tooting Popular Front find themselves terrified by local criminal Fenning over an issue of stolen stereos.

programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front gathers international support when a foreign revolutionary arrives at the house asking after Wolfie and talking about financial support.

programme.desc: Wolfie is shell-shocked to be given a job despite his best efforts otherwise, but Dad is delighted that Yeti is joining the honest working classes.

programme.desc: When an old school friend - now a successful American record producer - drops back into town, Wolfie begins to see himself as a rockstar in the making.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front gathers international support when a foreign revolutionary arrives at the house asking after Wolfie and talking about financial support.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers the secrets of Cornwall's Tintagel, famed as the legendary birthplace of King Arthur.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, the paramedics treat a woman who was kicked by a horse and a baby with breathing problems, while in Oxford, crews attend an elderly priest with abdominal pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Oxford paramedics are called to a woman who sustained a broken leg and horrific facial injuries, while in Portsmouth, a 2-year-old with breathing problems needs a nebuliser.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, the paramedics treat a woman who was kicked by a horse and a baby with breathing problems, while in Oxford, crews attend an elderly priest with abdominal pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Oxford paramedics are called to a woman who sustained a broken leg and horrific facial injuries, while in Portsmouth, a 2-year-old with breathing problems needs a nebuliser.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Hornby prepares for a right royal year with a miniature 1930s classic 'Coronation' train including the elegant 'Beavertail' observation carriage.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Music mogul Pete Waterman is recreating the section of West Coast Mainline where he spent his Saturdays as a child. New technology allows the public the ability to control the trains.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Paramjit in the Airfix team works on a Buccaneer fighter jet in 1:48 scale, complete with folding wings, extra armaments and exposed engine bay.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The Hornby team attempt to replicate the legendary 9F steam locomotive, using new design technology.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: There's a huge challenge for designer Phil to get the iconic curvature correct on Hornby's latest range of A4 locos.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Hornby prepares for a right royal year with a miniature 1930s classic 'Coronation' train including the elegant 'Beavertail' observation carriage.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In an Around the World elimination challenge, MasterChef contestants must create a dish inspired by a chosen cuisine, featuring a surprise hero ingredient. S18 E17

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage is hurt.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Jo and Lacey lock horns. Richie gets the cold shoulder. Can Cash and Eden find a way forward?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides fly into Brisbane for week complete with mining, fine dining, and the terrifying. This holiday hotspot is filled with spectacular scenery and quirky activities.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is told he is exempt from taking the Vice President's Assessment Test after receiving a perfect score on a practice test. S20 E11

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon reaches his limit when he works on projects with Leonard, Howard and Amy in one day! S10 E20

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: David wants to go home. Richie’s world collapses. Mali’s surf class takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Esther has a plan.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's a fusion invention test today with the contestants having to make dish featuring cuisines from two countries. S18 E18

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: For the first time, host Rob Brydon reveals to everyone on the X-bus where they actually are. And the players’ game plans are revealed - who has been keeping secrets from whom? S1 E6

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Potential love interests are introduced by gradually revealing their naked bodies... Then the contestants must choose a partner based on their first impressions.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Beach balls, water and sand contribute to a seaside feel, a jolly tone that is interrupted when Greg Davies must deal with the questionable actions of one contestant. Starring Joe Thomas. S8 E8

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a murder near a 19th century inspired traveling sideshow. S12 E6

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: Season Finale: Tanya Bogdanovich and Michael MacGregor's violent sexual fantasies escalate into the abduction, rape, and murder of kindergarten teacher Noelle Paquette. S8 E10

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: As she copes with Uncle Pete's overdose, Patty begins to unravel Walter Kendrick's energy scheme. Ellen finally deals with her grief over David. S2 E8

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy and Glenn get caught up in the Valentine's Day spirit, quickly learning what happens when you try to force love. S2 E14

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's a fusion invention test today with the contestants having to make dish featuring cuisines from two countries. S18 E18

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.
